Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgement, Memorandum In Support And Declarations Of Joshua Saulpaw And Aser G. Tolentino
Off Calendar Aug-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT JOSHUA SAULPAW'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT is GRANTED based on discretionary relief. Defendant's counsel timely filed, but neglected to serve, an counsel that they will be representing the defendant in this action after this action was filed and served. Answer to be filed and served no later than August 26, 2021.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
